single.title: Last Seen
single.searchTemplate: index=websense user="$username$" | stats max(_time) AS LastSeen | eval Lastseen=strftime(LastSeen, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | table Lastseen

single.title: Filtered by Policy
single.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="Bandwidth_by_action" user="$username$" | stats count by policy | table policy

single.title: Bandwidth used
single.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary user="$username$" search_name="bandwidth_by_user" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 | eval TotalBytes=MB_in+MB_out | stats sum(TotalBytes) AS TotalMB | eval TotalMB = tostring(TotalMB,"commas") + "MB"

chart.title: Bandwidth usage over time
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary user="$username$" search_name="bandwidth_by_user" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 |timechart sum(MB_in),sum(MB_out)

chart.title: Bandwidth usage by category (Top 10)
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary user="$username$" search_name="bandwidth_by_user" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 |eval Total_MB=MB_in+MB_out |timechart sum(Total_MB) AS Total_MB by category_name | sort -Total_MB

chart.title: Bandwidth usage by DST Host (Top 10)
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary user="$username$" search_name="bandwidth_by_user" | eval MB_in=Bytes_in/1024/1024 | eval MB_out=Bytes_out/1024/1024 |eval Total_MB=MB_in+MB_out |timechart sum(Total_MB) AS Total_MB by dst_host| sort -Total_MB

chart.title: User agent
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary user="$username$" search_name="user_proxy" | stats sum(count) by http_user_agent

chart.title: Action
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="action_by_user" user="$username$" | stats sum(count) AS Attempts by disposition_description | sort -Attempts

chart.title: Security events
chart.searchTemplate: index=websense_summary search_name="security_by_category" user="$username$" | stats sum(count) by category_child_name
